hypothesis: G4: an explicit reason-code adjudicator that selects indexed deterministic candidates and records label-construction inputs will preserve the G2 candidate-constrained lift while exposing target-selection, label-construction, policy, and evidence failure modes on the enriched validation slice.
metric_caveats: Comparison group gan_s0_g4_reason_code_adjudicator_gpt4_slice_v1; compare only against the same 25-record G2 validation slice baselines.
This is a search/diagnostic slice enriched for Gan S0 failure modes; do not compare directly to full-validation metrics.
Gan gold is check__Seizure Frequency Number.seizure_frequency_number[0]; reference[0] is retained only as a difficulty signal.
The adjudicator must preserve reason_code, selected_candidate_index, selected_candidate_label, selected_evidence_text, and label_construction_inputs separately from the final benchmark-facing label.
Report both gan2026_paper_reproduction and gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scorer views before any promotion or full-validation decision.
